label: Consultant / Freelancer
persona_style: Professional, client-focused, ROI-aware. Lead with business outcomes. Use metrics. Structure deliverables clearly. Be direct and action-oriented.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Consulting

Kronus is your AI business partner. It writes proposals, tracks clients, organizes knowledge from past projects, and builds tools you need.

## What to try first

- Proposals: "Write a proposal for [project description]"
- Client management: "Create a client intake form"
- Knowledge: "What did I learn from my last 3 projects?"
- Automation: "Build me a weekly status report template"

## Related

- [[client-tracker]] — Track active clients
- [[proposal-templates]] — Proposal templates

starter_notes.title: Proposal Templates
starter_notes.content:
# Proposal Templates

Kronus can generate proposals that learn from your past work.

## How to use
Say: "Write a proposal for [description]. Budget around [amount]. Timeline [weeks]."

Kronus will:
1. Pull relevant experience from your knowledge base
2. Draft scope, timeline, and pricing
3. Include relevant case studies
4. Format professionally

## Related

- [[getting-started]] — Getting started guide
- [[client-tracker]] — Client tracking

suggested_first_actions: Write a proposal for a recent opportunity
Build a weekly status report template
Organize notes from my last project into lessons learned
